title: context-radar tool record
description: One row of context-reduction-tools.csv, and one element of the tools array in context-reduction-tools.json. Property names match the CSV column headers exactly, including spaces and slashes.

Tool.description: Name used as the unique identifier throughout the catalogue.

GitHub URL.description: Canonical repository URL. Re-verify on org or owner transfers (see the fetch methodology).

Layer.description: The tool's primary layer. Group by prefix, not exact string equality: several raw strings collapse to one display layer.

What it does.description: Free-text description of the tool and how it reduces context tokens.

Conflict / Overlap.description: Starts with the hard-conflict marker for MCP tool-name collisions, the soft-conflict marker for redundant roles, or plain text when there is no conflict.

Runtime.description: Implementation language or runtime, free text.

Requirements.description: Starts with a warning marker if the tool needs an LLM API key, external infra, or a model download. Records the LLM dependency tier.

Licence.description: SPDX-ish licence string. Non-permissive licences (PolyForm NC, AGPL, Commons Clause, no licence) are called out.

Stars (15 Jul 2026).description: Verified star count at the snapshot date. Small counts are exact; large counts are rounded to the nearest thousand. The header carries the refresh date.

Trend (30d).description: Direction and percentage versus the previously recorded figure. Direction is reliable; the exact percentage is approximate and the window is not strictly 30 days.

Activity (Issues / PRs).description: Free-text detail on contributors, releases, and corroborating sources.

Activity Status.description: Status emoji plus label, for example the very-active, active, early, or dormant bands.

Verdict.description: Adoption verdict. See the verdict guide: Best in class, Add, Add if you use [X], Either/or pick one, Watch, Reference only, Drop.

Decision Rule.description: Free-text guidance, often including install commands and caveats such as which tools not to run alongside this one.
